PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,State,OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=8000; PID=$_.OwningProcess; State=$_.State; Process=$proc.Name; Path=$proc.MainModule.FileName} })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Id @\(1344, 19276, 19452, 25932, 14476, 6596\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { Write-Host "Still on 8000: $\($conns.OwningProcess -join ', '\)" } else { Write-Host "Port 8000 is now clear" })
